title: Automatic subscription invoices
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
Is there a way I can set up automation so that I get subscription invoice automatically sent to an email every month? 
Thank you!

posts.author: VeronikaKunova (Veronika Kunova)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: littlemisss74 (Stef)
posts.cookedHtml: I think veronica means the Monday invoice, it doesn’t seem possilbe to get this invoice sent as a PDF attachement, instead accountants have to go hunt ‘24 hours’ after the email notifcation has been sent that our susbscriptions has been paid/renewed
